name: Dragona Joestar
description:
"Fuck, again?"

DRAGONA IS SO CUTE!!!!

It saddens me so much that she is constantly harassed by so many people. First it was that stupid cop, then that stupid girl

People need to leave Dragona alone, seriously

It would be great if someone (You) was there to defend her, wouldn't it?

Protect my dear Dragona ;3
creator: Big_Lil_Cloofty
